title: 니니즈 — Hanni × Danielle in Starbucks colors
description: DESIGN.md import demo. Starbucks' four-tier green retail system (voltagent/awesome-design-md) reshaped for a 6-slide NewJeans editorial via the DESIGN.md → DESIGN.slides.md conversion workflow. Real Wikimedia Commons photos (CC-BY) of Hanni and Danielle.
